stemHtml: The engine air intake may contribute to a compressor stall when…

options.a: the pressure is insufficiently increased by the divergent air intake.
options.b: bleed-air is taken from the compressor for anti-icing purposes.
options.c: engine anti-icing is set to ON at high outside air temperatures.
options.d: the air flow separates due to a strong crosswind during take-off.
